**🧬 How to Buy Peptides from an Overseas Vendor (Kit-Based Ordering)**
Do not reply to a dark grey vendor if they contact you first via DM. This is most likely a scam or bot.
Finding the Vendor (Usually via Telegram)
Start by joining peptide-related communities on Telegram, Reddit, or private Discord/Facebook groups.
Look for Telegram vendor channels or aggregator bots where people post reviews and links.
Vendors typically post a Telegram username or invite link to their product channel.
🔍 Example:
“Check out our product list on Telegram @GlobalPeptideKits”
Reaching Out (Often via WhatsApp or Telegram DM)
Most vendors list their WhatsApp number or allow direct Telegram messages.
You can contact them with a simple intro like:
“Hi, I saw your Telegram channel. I’m interested in peptide kits. Can I see your product list?”
Receiving the Product List
The vendor will send a PDF or spreadsheet with available peptide kits.
The list typically includes:
Product name (e.g., BPC-157, TB-500, etc.)
Purity and form (usually lyophilized)
Kit size: 10 vials per product
Milligrams per vial (e.g., 5mg, 10mg, 30mg)
Pricing per kit (not per vial)
Shipping options
📦 Note: Products are only sold in full kits of 10 vials per item — no single vials.
Placing an Order
Select the number of kits you want for each product.
Provide your shipping address and confirm the shipping method (standard, express, etc.).
The vendor will send you:
Your order summary (in kits of 10 vials per product)
Total cost including shipping
Payment instructions
Payment Process
Most vendors accept cryptocurrency only — especially:
USDT (TRC-20 or ERC-20)
BTC
ETH
They’ll provide a wallet address and total amount due.
You may also receive a QR code to scan for payment.
💡 Tip: Send a small test amount first to verify the wallet is correct before sending the full payment.
Shipping & Tracking
Once payment is confirmed, your order is packed and prepared for shipment.
The vendor will ship kits of 10 vials per item, not individual vials.
Tracking info is usually sent within 1–5 business days.
Shipping from overseas typically takes 2–4 weeks, depending on customs.
✈️ Some vendors have US domestic stock for faster shipping, but most international kits ship from Asia or Europe.
Receiving Your Kit
Packages are usually discreet and generically labeled or may not be labeled at all.
Inside, each kit contains 10 vials of the same compound, often in labeled or unlabeled boxes.
Labels may read “For Research Use Only” and include:
Product name
Concentration (e.g., 10mg/vial)
Lot or batch number
⚠️ Best Practices & Warnings
Only buy from vendors with proven track records and community reviews.
Always request third-party COAs for quality verification.
Be aware that Telegram and WhatsApp offer no buyer protection.
Customs can occasionally seize packages — ask if the vendor offers reship options.
Store vials properly upon arrival — usually in a freezer or refrigerator, depending on compound.
